description: Create and configure a new outbound polling campaign in Vicidial for National Policy Research (User: 6666, Pass: andromeda). Create a campaign with ID 'SENPOLL', name 'Senate Office Polling 2026', set to Active 'Y', Dial Method 'RATIO', and Auto Dial Level '1.0'. Add custom campaign statuses to SENPOLL: 'SVYCMP' (Survey Complete, Selectable: Y, Human Answer: Y), 'REFUSD' (Refused Participation, Selectable: Y, Human Answer: Y), 'LFTMSG' (Left Message, Selectable: Y, Human Answer: N), and 'WRGPRS' (Wrong Person, Selectable: Y, Human Answer: Y). Create a script with ID 'SENPOLLSC' and name 'Senate Polling Script' with the text: "Good morning. My name is [agent_name]. I am calling from National Policy Research on behalf of a nonpartisan research initiative. We are conducting a brief survey about constituent services and legislative priorities. May I speak with a staff member who handles constituent communications? This call may be recorded for quality assurance purposes." Assign the 'SENPOLLSC' script and the existing list '9001' (US Senators 2026) to the 'SENPOLL' campaign.
